properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: Jesus I love you, shepherd of my soul, Jesus I love you, your presence makes me whole :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your presence is comforting, it's healing Your embrace calms my heart Your presence is power, it's peace of mind Your joy fills my heart There's no place like your presence my Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We worship you, we give you praise, no place like your presence, no place like your presence Oh we wave our hands to you, We lift our hearts to you for we love you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I love you, I love you, I love you I love you, I love you, I love you Jesus, Jesus

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Your presence is comforting, it's healing Your embrace calms my heart Your presence is power, it's peace of mind Your joy, your joy, your joy fills my heart There is no place Like your presence, no where, no place, no where like your presence Nobody, not my mama, not my papa No place like your presence. There's no place like your presence my Lord
